brand.name: PetBuddy
brand.tagline: A premium pet care system with high-quality products and services.

chatModal.title: PetBuddy chat
chatModal.subtitle: Ask us anything about booking, products, or pet care tips.
chatModal.greeting: Hi! We’re here to help you choose the best service for your pet.
chatModal.reply: Our team can answer in a few minutes. What would you like to know?
chatModal.followUp: If you need a service recommendation, tell us your pet’s size and coat condition.
chatModal.sideDescription: This space is reserved for a larger chat box so the conversation feels easier to read.

hero.title: Complete care for your beloved pets
hero.subtitle: Professional, caring services and the highest quality products for every pet in your family.

services.title: Professional spa & grooming services
services.subtitle: Enjoy 5-star pet care with animal-loving specialists and experienced groomers.

bath.title: Bath & blow dry
bath.description: A multi-step bath routine with specialized shampoos to deep clean, deodorize, and leave coats silky smooth for all breeds.

grooming.title: Grooming & styling
grooming.description: Artistic trimming based on standard styles or personal requests to make pets look neat, cute, and confident.

love.title: Love like family
love.description: We treat every pet with care, kindness, and genuine affection.

authentic.title: Authentic products
authentic.description: 100% verified sources, safe and healthy for your pets.

support.title: 24/7 friendly support
support.description: Our experts are always ready to advise on nutrition and pet care.

hero.title: Contact & support
hero.subtitle: We're here to provide the best care for your pets. Reach out to our dedicated team anytime.
hero.imageAlt: Warm veterinary reception area with a happy dog and owner

info.title: Our information
info.address: 151 Huy Can, Thu Duc, Ho Chi Minh City
info.mapAlt: Map view of Thu Duc district in Ho Chi Minh City

policies.purchaseDescription: At PetBuddy, we are committed to a safe, transparent shopping experience. Every food, accessory, and care item is reviewed carefully before reaching your pet.

verified.title: Verified origins
verified.description: Every product is authentic and checked for safety and quality.

quality.title: High quality
quality.description: We prioritize premium products that meet trusted pet-care standards.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.description: Our team is ready to help you choose the right products and services.

purchaseConditions.title: Return conditions
items: Products delivered incorrectly (wrong code, size, color, quantity)
Products damaged during shipping (dented, broken, torn packaging)
Products in original condition with receipt and tags

shippingHero.title: Free shipping in inner city
shippingHero.description: Orders within central HCM City districts enjoy complimentary delivery.

fast.title: Fast delivery
fast.description: Most orders are processed and shipped within 2-4 hours after confirmation.

safe.title: Safe packaging
safe.description: Careful packaging keeps products protected during transit.

schedule.title: Flexible schedule
schedule.description: Choose a delivery window that fits your routine.

return.intro: PetBuddy is committed to providing the best quality products for your pets. If any issues arise, we are ready to support returns and exchanges according to our policy.

notApplicable.title: Not eligible for return
items: Products damaged due to improper storage
Scratched or broken products from impact
Custom-made orders (special sizes, colors, personalized items)

petbuddyFault.title: PetBuddy's fault
petbuddyFault.description: PetBuddy covers outbound shipping. Customer pays return shipping.

customerFault.title: Customer's fault
customerFault.description: Customer pays all shipping fees for both directions.

steps.title: Contact us
steps.description: Email, call hotline, or chat directly on website

steps.title: Provide information
steps.description: Order ID, photos/videos of defects, detailed description

steps.title: Process completed
steps.description: Exchange or refund within 2 business days

return.note: Contact hotline 092 199 9319 or email hotro@petbuddy.vn for quick support.

booking.question: How can I book a grooming appointment for my dog?
booking.answer: You can book directly from the Services section on our website or contact our hotline at 092 199 9319 for quick support from the PetBuddy team.

delivery.question: Do you offer home delivery?
delivery.answer: Yes. We provide nationwide delivery and complimentary shipping for many qualifying orders within inner Ho Chi Minh City under our current policy.

returns.question: What is your product return policy?
returns.answer: PetBuddy supports returns within 7 days for manufacturer defects or items that do not match the description, as long as the product remains unused and keeps its original labels.

loyalty.question: Do you have benefits for loyal customers?
loyalty.answer: Yes. Our member rewards program lets you collect points for discount vouchers, gifts, and exclusive perks for returning customers.

newsletter.title: Join our pet-loving community
newsletter.description: Get exclusive care tips, health updates, and special offers delivered to your inbox every week.
newsletter.imageAlt: Two happy dogs sitting together in a park

team.title: Professional team
team.description: Our groomers are professionally trained, certified, and experienced. They are also pet parents who understand how to keep pets relaxed and happy.

footer.address: 123 Pet Street, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City
footer.copyright: © 2026 Pet Store. Caring for your pets every day.
